__fixture__.name: dashboard_approximate_derived
__fixture__.scenario: A performance dashboard card shows an aggregate produced from sampled telemetry. The sample is recent, but the count is approximate, so the view uses Approximate and exports the sampling disclosure.

badge.accessible_name: Approximate derived dashboard; sampled telemetry does not represent an exact count.
badge.summary_label: Dashboard aggregate is recent but sampled.

authority_source.owner_label: Performance dashboard aggregate derived from sampled telemetry.

freshness_floor.label: Dashboard aggregate refreshes within the dashboard sampling window.

basis.basis_label: Dashboard aggregate for the current sampling window.

completeness.declared_scope_label: Dashboard sampling window for the performance lab tenant.
completeness.covered_scope_label: All telemetry admitted to the current sampling window.

invalidation.label: Valid for the current sampling window; not an exact event count.

snapshot_delta_parity.label: Dashboard aggregate is recomputed per sample window, not applied as a live delta stream.

refresh_action.label: Open raw benchmark run records for exact event inspection.

input_sources.source_label: Sampled startup telemetry for the current dashboard window.

approximations.reason_label: The card uses sampled telemetry and does not count every raw run event.
approximations.confidence_label: Dashboard confidence is sufficient for trend review, not exact audit.
approximations.error_bound_label: Exact error bound is not available from this sample.

export_posture.export_label: Export preserves sampling-window basis and approximate-count disclosure.
export_posture.support_packet_label: Support packet keeps the dashboard sample basis separate from raw run records.
